title: Alsophila perpunctulata
taxonomy: Alsophila perpunctulata is a species of tree fern within the family Cyatheaceae. This family is part of the division Pteridophyta, which comprises all vascular plants that reproduce via spores. Alsophila perpunctulata is native to New Zealand and other parts of the Pacific region. It is a perennial plant that belongs to the genus Alsophila, which is characterized by its distinctive fronds. Alsophila perpunctulata is classified as a fern, specifically a type of cycad fern.

intro: Alsophila perpunctulata, also known as the Queensland tree fern, is a species of fern native to Australia.
